zh.lifeSummary: Ann Bignell於1587年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什。她於1609年2月23日與John Hartshorn在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1630年1月在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什。

nameMeanings.name: Bignell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bicknell . This form of the surname reflects the placename Bignell near Bicester, Oxfordshire, so named with an Old English personal name Biga + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Bicknell
meanings: English: habitational name from Bickenhill in Warwickshire, Bickenhall in Somerset or Bignell in Oxfordshire. The former two are named with the Old English personal name Bicca + Old English hyll ‘hill’, but in the Somerset name the final element alternates with Old English h(e)all ‘hall’. Bignell is named with the Old English personal name Biga + hyll ‘hill’. Compare Bignell .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Ann Bignell was born in 1587, in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England. She married John Hartshorn on 23 February 1609, in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in January 1630, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ann Bignell est née en 1587, à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Hartshorn le 23 février 1609, à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1630, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Bignellは1587年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュで生まれた。1609年2月23日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュでJohn Hartshornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年1月に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Bignell(은)는 1587년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1609년 2월 23일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에서 John Hartshorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ann Bignell родилась в 1587 г. в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hartshorn 23 февраля 1609 г. в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла январь 1630 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия.
